query: Our SaaS app has 10,000 signups but only 800 are active after 30 days. What should we focus on?
expected_behavior: Identifies the retention bottleneck by AARRR stage (Retention/Activation) before recommending any acquisition spend
Names the D30 retention rate (8%) explicitly and compares it to a reference benchmark
Recommends a cohort analysis to find where users drop off (not a blended average)
Does not recommend increasing ad spend until retention is diagnosed
Proposes a specific retention experiment with a defined success threshold
